name: SHUHUA
title: A Star's Dream
mainAbility: Power of the Wolf / Melee Combat

stats.label: Agility
stats.description: Critical Hit Rate and Critical Hit Damage

basic.name: Do-Re-Mi Glitch
basic.description: SHUHUA controls her mana orbs to attack. Deals Water elemental damage.

core.name: Rhythmic Beatdown
core.description: SHUHUA controls her mana orbs to attack in two directions at once. Deals Water elemental damage. When this skill hits it inflicts the [Airborne] effect. Enhanced version: High-energy Beat (damage +50% base, +100% at A1).

skill.name: Pop Star Landing
skill.description: SHUHUA performs an arching high jump and then strikes down into the ground to create a special effect zone. Deals Water elemental damage. When this skill hits it inflicts the [Airborne] effect.

skill.name: Starlight Bark
skill.description: SHUHUA controls her mana orbs to unleash violent, chaotic slashes of mana. Deals Water elemental damage. When the final hit lands it inflicts the [Airborne] effect. Changes to Starlight Howl at A2 (damage +100%).

support.name: Showtime
support.description: SHUHUA jumps and lands with a theatrical flair, creating a special effect zone upon landing. Deals Water elemental damage. When this skill hits it inflicts the [Airborne] effect. Using this skill grants [Start the Music]: Shield equal to 12% of ATK, Duration: 8s.

qte.name: Twinkling Arpeggio
qte.description: SHUHUA appears above the battlefield and creates an "X" with her mana orbs while pointing them ahead and towards the ground, performing a slashing attack. Deals Water elemental damage. When this skill hits it inflicts the [Airborne] effect. Usage Conditions: Extreme Evasion, Core Attack, Ultimate Skill, skills that inflict the [Stun] or [Blind] effects, or a Shadow Skill.

ultimate.name: Catharsis in the Harmony
ultimate.description: SHUHUA is magically imbued with the power of a wolf and unleashes a fierce claw attack. Deals Water elemental damage. When this skill hits it inflicts the [Airborne] effect.

passive.name: On the Stage / High-energy / Performance
passive.description: The entire team gains [FOREVER] (+5% damage dealt, stacks up to 3 times, Infinite) when entering the Encore Mission and Instance Dungeon. Using Pop Star Landing activates [On the Stage]: activates [Performance] effect every 3s, Duration: 15s. [Performance]: Core Attack damage +50%, grants Shield (10% ATK), Duration: 3s. Using Starlight Bark/Howl activates [High-energy]: Rhythmic Beatdown → High-energy Beat (+50% damage); when Core Attack activates and High-energy Beat is used it doesn't consume Core Gauge; when Core Attack hits, cooldowns of Pop Star Landing, Starlight Bark/Howl reduced by 3s (Cooldown: 1s); can only apply to up to 6 consecutive Core Attacks; Duration: 3.5s.

advancements: [High-energy] enhanced: High-energy Beat damage +100%, cooldown reduction on Core Attack hit +5s. Each time High-energy Beat hits it inflicts [Tension Drop] on target: Water damage taken from SHUHUA +1%, Duration: 30s, stacks up to 10 times.
Starlight Bark changes to Starlight Howl, increasing the user's damage by 100%.
[Performance] enhanced: Core Attack damage +55%, Shield (15% ATK), Power Gauge +10%, activates [Tension Up]: Water damage +20%, Duration: 3s.
Using Starlight Howl activates [Volume Up]: damage dealt +30%, Critical Hit Rate +30%, Duration: 10s. Attack speed of High-energy Beat significantly increases.
